brand.name: NinjaClick
brand.tagline: Turn Anonymous Visitors Into Known Customers

offer.what: Visitor intelligence SaaS platform: one JS snippet identifies up to 80% of anonymous website visitors, revealing company info and decision-maker contact details without forms or cookies
offer.coreOutcome: Turn anonymous website traffic into identified, contactable leads so sales and marketing teams can engage high-intent prospects in real time
offer.pricePoint: Free tier (100 identities/mo); Growth $97/mo; Scale $497/mo (10,000 identities); Enterprise $997/mo (50,000 identities)
offer.commitment: Monthly subscription; no long-term contract; 14-day free trial, no credit card required
leadMagnets: 14-day free trial — no credit card required
Permanent free tier up to 100 identities/month

audience.icp: Digital marketers, demand-gen managers, and B2B sales teams at companies with meaningful website traffic who are frustrated that most visitors leave without ever identifying themselves
painPoints: 95%+ of website visitors leave without filling out a form
Ad and SEO spend goes unaccounted — traffic arrives but leads never materialize
Sales teams have no visibility into which target accounts are actively researching
Marketing cannot measure true campaign effectiveness beyond click rates
CRM stays sparse because top-of-funnel identification is broken
segments: B2B sales teams seeking intent-based prospecting signals
E-commerce and DTC brands wanting to recover and re-engage anonymous shoppers
Growth teams at SaaS companies tracking product-led or content-driven traffic

salesCycle.trial: 14-day free trial, no credit card required; permanent free tier available (up to 100 identities)
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Self-serve signup with free trial; Enterprise plans close via 'Contact Sales' call
salesCycle.topObjection: Privacy and GDPR concerns about identifying visitors without explicit consent; skepticism about real-world match rates vs. advertised figures

ahaMoment: Seeing the first batch of identified visitors — real names, company, and contact info — appear in the dashboard within minutes of installing the JS snippet

retention.recurring: Monthly subscription (MRR); tiered by identity volume per month
retention.expansion: Upgrade from Growth → Scale → Enterprise as identity volume needs grow; potential team-seat expansion
retention.churnRisk: Low perceived ROI if identify-to-pipeline conversion is poor; CRM/integration friction; privacy regulation changes eroding match rates

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — critical: new users must install the snippet and see first identified visitors within the 14-day trial window to activate
Trial/Consult Conversion — converting free-tier or expiring trial users to a paid plan before the window closes
Value Newsletter — educating subscribers on use cases (ABM, e-commerce recovery, intent data) to deepen engagement and drive expansion
Renewal & Expansion — proactive upsell when users approach monthly identity limits; annual plan conversion
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — re-engaging lapsed free-tier users or churned subscribers who installed but never activated
toneVoice: Confident and results-driven; direct, data-forward language; professional but not stuffy; leads with measurable business outcomes over technical jargon; action-oriented ('identify', 'convert', 'engage')
compliance: GDPR compliant per site claims; CAN-SPAM applies for email outreach; privacy-sensitive vertical — email copy should reinforce data-privacy credentials and avoid implying surveillance; no HIPAA or financial-services constraints identified
